post.description:
Unified endpoint for tier changes.
- No current subscription: subscribes immediately
- Higher baseFee tier: upgrades immediately (install fee deducted from prior payments)
- Lower baseFee tier: queues downgrade for next billing period
Admin-only endpoint to change a merchant's subscription tier

merchantId.description: Merchant account ID to change tier for

uuid.description: Tier UUID to subscribe merchant to
